evals.prompt: what tickets are assigned to me in NS?
evals.expected_output: A list of open NS tickets assigned to the user, excluding Done/Closed/Canceled
expectations: JQL excludes terminal statuses using NOT IN (not !=)
Returns readable results with ticket keys and summaries

evals.prompt: create a ticket in IT for setting up a new monitor for the boardroom
evals.expected_output: An IT ticket is created with a relevant summary about the monitor setup
expectations: Uses a valid issue type for the IT project
Ticket is successfully created (IT-xxx key returned)

evals.prompt: log 1 hour on NS-682 for skill testing
evals.expected_output: A 1-hour worklog entry is added to NS-682
expectations: Logs time on NS-682 (not a different ticket)
Worklog is successfully added (confirmed by API response or verification)

evals.prompt: what are all my open tickets?
evals.expected_output: Open tickets from both NS and IT projects
expectations: Searches the IT project (not just NS)
Excludes terminal statuses using NOT IN
